headline: Mission Accomplished? рҹӣіпёҸрҹ’Ҙ Iraq Ghost рҹ‘» HAUNTS Iran Smackdown рҹ”ҘрҹҮ®рҹҮ·
text:
Flashback to 2003 Baghdad BANGER рҹ’Ҙрҹ—Ҫ: Saddam's THICC statue рҹ—ҪрҹҚҶ getting NOOSED рҹҳҲрҹӘў by Iraqi bros рҹ§”вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҮ®рҹҮ¶ scaling like Spider-Man рҹ•·пёҸ, but US Abrams tank daddy рҹҡңрҹ’Ә YANKS it DOWN рҹ“үрҹ’Ё! Metal plaque RIPPED рҹ‘Ӣрҹ”Ё, marble plinth SMASHED рҹ”ЁрҹҚ‘ вҖ“ regime change SYMBOLIZED рҹҺӯрҹ”Ҙ after 20-day blitzkrieg рҹӣ©пёҸрҹ’Ј with cruise missile HEADHUNTS рҹҺҜрҹ‘‘ on Saddam! Then Dubya рҹҗўрҹӨ  struts on USS Abraham Lincoln рҹӣіпёҸрҹҮәрҹҮё behind that ICONIC 'MISSION ACCOMPLISHED' banner рҹҺҠрҹҡ« вҖ“ SPOILER: TOTAL FLOP рҹҳӯрҹ’Җ!

Iraq War NIGHTMARE рҹ©ёрҹҢӘпёҸ left 461K DEAD вҳ пёҸрҹ“Ҳ (2003-2011), $3TRILLION рҹ’ёрҹ”Ҙ torched, Middle East REMIXED рҹ—әпёҸрҹҳө, trust in pols SHATTERED рҹӨЎрҹ“ү like WMD LIES рҹ§ўвҳўпёҸ! Neo-con DREAMERS рҹҰ…рҹ“ң wanted Baghdad -> Tehran DOMINOES рҹҺ°рҹҮ®рҹҮ·, post-9/11 RAGE вңҲпёҸрҹ’Ҙ (2,977 RIP рҹҳў) + unfinished Gulf War BEEF рҹ‘Ҡ from Bush Sr. рҹ§“ vs Saddam's ASSASSIN PLOT рҹ—ЎпёҸрҹҳҲ. Tony Blair's 'WHATEVER' SIMP NOTE рҹ“қрҹҳҚ to Dubya вҖ“ UK PM riding COATTTAILS рҹҗҺрҹҮ¬рҹҮ§ for influence, but Jack Straw SPILLS вҳ• 'BAD IDEA' рҹӨҰвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ! WMDs? FAKE NEWS рҹ“°рҹҡ« вҖ“ CIA boss Luis Rueda ROASTS рҹ”Ҙ: 'Rubber band + paperclip = INVASION TIME рҹҳӮрҹ“Һ'!

Fast-forward to Trump 2.0 рҹҚҠрҹ”Ҙ vs Iran mullahs рҹ•ҢрҹҳЎ: Hamas Oct 7 Israel BBQ рҹҘ©рҹ’Ҙ flips scripts рҹ“ңвһЎпёҸ, proxies BODIED рҹ‘Ҡ, no UN BS рҹҡ«рҹҢҗ, no public HYPE TRAIN рҹҡӮрҹ“ә вҖ“ Donnie veers like MAGA mood swings рҹҳӨрҹҳӮ! Allies? Israel BFFs рҹӨқрҹҮ®рҹҮұ, UK Keir Starmer GHOSTS рҹ«ҘрҹҸҙу Ғ§у Ғўу ҒҘу Ғ®у Ғ§у Ғҝ (no bases initially рҹҡ«вңҲпёҸ), ditching Blair-style CLINGER рҹҗ’. Pete Hegseth SWEARING рҹҷҢ 'No FOREVER WAR рҹ•°пёҸрҹҳӨ' вҖ“ air strikes ONLY рҹ“Ҳрҹ’Ј, no 150K booties on ground рҹҘҫрҹҡ« unlike Iraq INSURGENCY HELL рҹ”ҘрҹҸ—пёҸ!

John Bolton BOMB рҹ’Ј: 'Iraq flop? DUMP Federalist Papers рҹ“–рҹҳӮ on 'em вҖ“ GOOD LUCK рҹ–•!' But Iran WINS from Saddam YEET рҹ—‘пёҸ, expands like proxy ORGY рҹ’ҰрҹҮ®рҹҮ·! Kurds ARM-UP TALK рҹӣЎпёҸрҹ«Ў for ground game? Planning? ZERO рҹҳөвҖҚрҹ’« вҖ“ Trump plotting HIS 'Mission Accomplished' FLEX рҹӣіпёҸрҹ“ё, maybe just MISSILE NERF рҹ”§рҹҡҖ + 'Iran peeps, YOU regime change bby рҹ‘Ӣрҹҳҳ!' Easier SMASH state рҹҸӣпёҸрҹ”Ё than BUILD рҹ‘·вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹӨ·вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ вҖ“ Gulf simps SWEATING рҹҳ°рҹҸңпёҸ, econ BLOWBACK рҹ“үрҹ’ё hitting Donnie's wallet рҹӨ‘?

LESSON? HUMILITY OR BUST рҹҷҸрҹҳӨ вҖ“ wars UNPREDICTABLE рҹҺІрҹ’Ҙ like Epstein list DROPS рҹ“ңрҹҚҶ! Iraq ghost рҹ‘» HAUNTS Iran beef рҹҘ©рҹ”Ҙ, but will Trump AVOID Dubya's QUAGMIRE рҹҸңпёҸрҹ•іпёҸ or cook ANOTHER trillion-dollar BBQ рҹҢӯрҹ’°? World CHANGED рҹҢҚвһЎпёҸрҹҳө вҖ“ old order COLLAPSED рҹҸ°рҹ’Ҙ, mercurial Donnie FREESTYLING рҹҺӨрҹҳӮ no allies, no excuses! BBC deep dive SPILLS вҳ•рҹ”Қ вҖ“ stay WOKE рҹ“Ҳрҹ‘Җ!
